description: Style Note A brand known for its unpredictable and unique styling baggit continues to awe us with their attractive designs for wallets. Available to you in an unusual design and at prices that do not burn a hole in your pocket, this wallet  is a must buy. So go ahead. Indulge. Product Details Brown wallet with panelled front Knit texture on top panel and branding on the bottom Three main compartments Three credit card slots on the left and one coin pocket on the right Materials and Care Synthetic Wipe with damp cloth to remove dirt Size Height: 10 cm Width: 12  cm
